Simplified: 请问，这家商店几点开门，几点关门？
Traditional: 請問，這家商店幾點開門，幾點關門？
Pinyin: Qǐng wèn, zhè jiā shāng diàn jǐ diǎn kāi mén, jǐ diǎn guān mén?
English: Excuse me, what time does this store open and close?

Simplified: 早上八点开门，晚上十点半关门。
Traditional: 早上八點開門，晚上十點半關門。
Pinyin: Zǎo shàng bā diǎn kāi mén, wǎn shàng shí diǎn bàn guān mén.
English: It opens at 8 a.m. and closes at 10:30 p.m.

Pinyin: Zhōu liù zhōu tiān kāi bù kāi?
English: Is it open on Saturday and Sunday?

Pinyin: Zhōu liù kāi mén, zhōu tiān xiū xi.
English: It opens on Saturday but is closed on Sunday.
